# Prepper Evolution
> Adapt. Prepare. Evolve. Expert gear reviews and field-tested guides for preppers and overlanders.

## About
Prepper Evolution is a practical preparedness and overlanding resource built by real people who have lived through power outages, supply chain disruptions, and severe weather. We focus on gear that works, not tactical fantasies.

## Content
- Emergency preparedness guides for beginners and experienced preppers
- Bug-out bag building guides with real gear recommendations
- Water filtration and storage systems
- Overlanding gear reviews (rooftop tents, fridges, solar, racks)
- Interactive tools: calculators for bug-out bags, water storage, food storage, solar power, 72-hour kits
- Vehicle profile configurator for overlanding setups
- Product reviews with hands-on testing

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://prepperevolution.com/
- Articles: https://prepperevolution.com/articles/beginners-guide-to-prepping
- Bug Out Bags: https://prepperevolution.com/articles/building-your-first-bug-out-bag
- Water Systems: https://prepperevolution.com/articles/best-off-grid-water-filtration-systems
- Overlanding Guide: https://prepperevolution.com/articles/overlanding-preparedness-guide
- Tools: https://prepperevolution.com/tools
